description: Use this API to remove a library from the list being searched for library models. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr = dropmodellibrary(libraryname)

parameters.name: libraryname
parameters.description: Name of the library of model programs. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: there are still models in use from this library; unload not done.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
